description: Google Cloud Network Connectivity provides APIs for managing connectivity between Google Cloud resources, including hubs, spokes, route tables, and related network connectivity objects. It is part of Google Cloud's networking services.
summary: Google Cloud Network Connectivity exposes a REST API at `https://networkconnectivity.googleapis.com/v1` authenticated with Google Cloud bearer access tokens; the docs also reference gcloud commands, but those target the same API rather than a separate domain-specific CLI surface.
